task: ahhh theres some unsigned commits on that pr - I think the gsd workflows don't have shells with the 1pass integration, so they are unable to request signatures.
user_feedback_text: ahhh theres some unsigned commits on that pr - I think the gsd workflows don't have shells with the 1pass integration, so they are unable to request signatures.

task: ok, then I think the only rational approach to take is to disable the signature requirement on the branch protection, and only have it enabled on the tag protection, since the merges are mostly done by GH and are signed by default.
user_feedback_text: ok, then I think the only rational approach to take is to disable the signature requirement on the branch protection, and only have it enabled on the tag protection, since the merges are mostly done by GH and are signed by default.
